wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Endless Conveyor.png}} {{E|Endless Conveyor|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Grab Something Off the Belt}} {{TS|negative||Pay 40 {{2|Gold}}.}} {{TS|positive||Receive a random dish (see below).}} * After each grab, you may continue grabbing or Leave.
{{Frame|Observe the Chef}} {{TS|positive||{{2|Upgrade}} a random card.}} === Dishes === Each grab serves a random dish from the belt (40 Gold each, except Golden Fysh which is free): {| class="wikitable" style="width: 650px;" ! Dish !! Effect !! Weight !! Notes |- | Caviar || Gain 4 Max HP. || 6 || |- | Clam Roll || Heal 10 HP. || 6 || Only if not at full HP. |- | Spicy Snappy || {{2|Upgrade}} a random card. || 3 || |- | Jelly Liver || {{2|Transform}} a card. || 3 || |- | Fried Eel || Add a random [[Colorless]] card to Deck. || 3 || |- | Suspicious Condiment || Procure a random {{2|Potions|Potion}}. || 3 || Only if potion slots available. |- | Golden Fysh || Gain 75 Gold (free). || 1 || Only appears after 2+ grabs. |- | Seapunk Salad || Add {{C|Feeding Frenzy||2}} to Deck. || — || Forced every 5th grab. |} * The same dish cannot appear twice in a row. * Requires at least 120 {{2|Gold}} on every player to appear. == Dialogue ==
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads: {{TS|aqua||"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"}} Inside, a {{TS|orange||willowy multi-armed chef}} is deftly preparing {{TS|green||bites of food}} and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt. One of the chef's arms point to a sign: {{TS|blue||40}} {{TS|gold||Gold}} each
{{Frame|Observe the Chef}}
Keeping your distance from a seat, you loiter in the shadows of the establishment's entrance. The chef, unfazed, continues working. Studying this behavior and discipline, you seek to minimize unnecessary movement and emotion during combat.
{{Frame|Leave}}
Now that you've had your fill, you continue on your way.
== Update History == * '''Early Access v0.103.2''' **Endless Conveyor changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game. *'''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)''' **Changed Endless Conveyor event: **Can no longer spawn unless all players have at least 120 Gold (up from 105) **"Grab off the Belt" option cost increased from 35 -> 40 Gold [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
